name: claudecall
description: Turn Claude into your personal communication agent — sends emails, places phone calls, and messages on Telegram, with explicit human approval before anything goes out.
long_description: ClaudeCall bundles email (SMTP), voice calls (Vapi), and Telegram (user account via MTProto) into one Claude Desktop extension. Every outbound action is previewed in chat and waits for your 'ok' before sending. Your credentials never leave your machine — they're stored in the OS keychain.

claudecall_root.title: State directory
claudecall_root.description: Where ClaudeCall stores history, pending drafts, and your style profile. Leave default unless you know what you're doing.

smtp_host.title: SMTP host
smtp_host.description: Email server hostname. For Gmail: smtp.gmail.com

smtp_user.title: SMTP username (your email address)
smtp_user.description: The email address you send from.

smtp_pass.title: SMTP password or app password
smtp_pass.description: For Gmail: create an app password at https://myaccount.google.com/apppasswords (requires 2FA).

smtp_from.title: From display name and address (optional)
smtp_from.description: Format: "Your Name <you@example.com>". Leaves blank to use SMTP username.

vapi_api_key.title: Vapi API key
vapi_api_key.description: From https://dashboard.vapi.ai → Settings → API Keys. Leave blank to disable phone calls.

vapi_phone_number_id.title: Vapi phone number ID
vapi_phone_number_id.description: The ID of a phone number in your Vapi account. Leave blank to disable phone calls.

vapi_assistant_id.title: Vapi assistant ID
vapi_assistant_id.description: The ID of the assistant that will speak on calls. Leave blank to disable phone calls.

telegram_api_id.title: Telegram API ID
telegram_api_id.description: From https://my.telegram.org → API development tools. Leave blank to disable Telegram.

telegram_api_hash.title: Telegram API hash
telegram_api_hash.description: 32-character string from my.telegram.org. Leave blank to disable Telegram.

telegram_session.title: Telegram session string
telegram_session.description: Run 'node scripts/telegram_login.mjs' from the ClaudeCall git repo to obtain this, then paste it here. Without this, Telegram tools will not work.

tools.name: query_history
tools.description: Recent interactions with a contact across all channels

tools.name: log_sent
tools.description: Log a sent message to history

tools.name: email_preview
tools.description: Draft an email and wait for approval

tools.name: email_send
tools.description: Send an approved email via SMTP

tools.name: voice_preview
tools.description: Draft an outbound call and wait for approval

tools.name: voice_create_call
tools.description: Place an approved call via Vapi

tools.name: telegram_preview
tools.description: Draft a Telegram message and wait for approval

tools.name: telegram_send
tools.description: Send an approved message through your Telegram account

tools.name: telegram_read_history
tools.description: Read recent messages from a chat
